word: G523 - ἀπαιτέω - apaitéō - ap-ah'-ee-teh-o - Ask again

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀπαιτέω

- Transliteration: Apaiteo

- Phonetic: ap-ah'-ee-teh-o

- Definition:

1. to ask back, demand back, exact something due

- Origin: from G575 and G154

- TDNT entry: 04:13,3

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: From G575 and G154; to demand back: - ask again require.
